articles.title: Micron has turned into ‘the most important stock in the market.’ So is it time to worry?

articles.title: Netflix is getting stingier about its viewing data, and Wall Street isn’t happy

articles.title: 10 U.S. metro areas where builders are slashing prices on new homes
articles.description: Existing-home prices just hit a new record high — but there are plenty of newly built homes selling at a discount, as desperate builders cut prices.

articles.description: The megarocket’s success is SpaceX’s “single most important watch item,” one analyst says.

articles.title: Americans say they need $1.2 million to retire. Most are too deep in debt to get there.
